LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: A R G U E D. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (WHICH WAS CORRECTED AT THE START OF THE HEARING DUE TO A TYPOGRAPHICAL ERROR) ON DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. THE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. THE PARAGRAPH CALLED "TIME OF PAYMENT" IS NOT ON ITS FACE UNENFORCEABLE. THERE IS A TIME FOR PAYMENT STATED. THE LAST SENTENCE IS SUBJECT TO INTERPRETATION, LEAVE A FACT ISSUE THAT CANNOT BE DETERMINED ON THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Deft And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff REAL ESTATE EBROKER, INC.'S Motion to Compel Deposition of Defendant and for Sanctions is denied as moot. On June 18, 2013 - two days before Plaintiff filed this motion -- the parties agreed on potential dates in August for Mr. Litke's deposition, subject to obtaining a continuance of the July 29 trial date. On June 25, the Court continued the trial date to September 16. Accordingly, the deposition can now proceed on the agreed upon August dates, and this motion is, thus, moot. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. The Court will issue an order. Judge Pro Tem: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas Foran, Esq. of the Law Offices of Joseph Sacramento, Tel. 415.775.0891, for defendant and moving party;
R. Stephen Goldstein, Esq. of Goldstein Gellman Melbostad Harris & McSparran, Tel. 415.673.5600, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling (which was corrected at the start of the hearing due to a typographical error) on DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is granted. The Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied. The paragraph called "Time of Payment" is not on its face unenforceable. There is a time for payment stated. The last sentence is subject to interpretation, leave a fact issue that cannot be determined on this motion. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
